title: OpenPlanTrace Benchmark Manifest
description: Schema for OpenPlanTrace benchmark manifests used to run deterministic regression fixtures against real PDF, DXF, CAD, and normalized primitive sources. The manifest defines source paths plus count, diagnostics, timing, and detector target expectations. It does not represent AI output.

marker.description: Expected marker text for annotation-reference targets, such as a keynote number or callout letter.

detectedTags.description: Optional required object or object-group tag codes, such as P-101 or TK-201. Every listed tag must be present on the matched detection.

suppressesChildObjects.description: Expected aggregate/routing behavior: true when child object detections should not be emitted as separate downstream routing obstacles.

objectCandidateId.description: Expected child object candidate ID for routing-suppressed-object targets.

suppressedByAggregateId.description: Expected aggregate ID that owns or replaces the child object for downstream routing.

replacementRoutingObstacleId.description: Expected replacement routing obstacle ID when a child object is represented by an aggregate obstacle.

roomUseHintId.description: Expected room-use hint ID when a child object is represented by aggregate room-use evidence only.

confidence.description: Optional confidence copied from the scan detection that seeded this target. It is provenance for review, not a matching criterion.

sourcePrimitiveIds.description: Optional source primitive IDs copied from the scan detection that seeded this target. They are provenance for review, not matching criteria.

sourceLayers.description: Optional source layer names copied from the scan detection that seeded this target. They are provenance for review, not matching criteria.

evidence.description: Optional human-readable evidence copied from the scan detection that seeded this target. It is provenance for review, not a matching criterion.

minAnnotationReferences.description: Minimum number of plan-side annotation marker references, such as keynote bubbles or callout tags.

minSurfacePatterns.description: Minimum number of dense non-structural surface/detail pattern candidates expected, such as terrace, hatch, tile, or overroof grids excluded from wall topology.

minObjectAggregates.description: Minimum number of compound object aggregates expected. Useful for detecting grouped objects such as vehicles or repeated equipment assemblies.

minRoutingItems.description: Minimum total routing-layer items expected across barriers, passages, obstacles, and room-use hints.

minRoutingSuppressedObjects.description: Minimum number of child object detections expected to be suppressed from downstream routing by object aggregates.

maxSurfacePatterns.description: Maximum number of dense non-structural surface/detail pattern candidates allowed before the scan should be reviewed for over-detection.

requirePipelineDependencyReady.description: When set, requires the complete pipeline execution plan to have no missing required artifact dependencies.

maxPipelinePlanIssues.description: Maximum allowed number of execution-plan issues across all stages.

maxPipelinePlanWarnings.description: Maximum allowed number of execution-plan warning issues across all stages.

maxPipelinePlanErrors.description: Maximum allowed number of execution-plan error issues across all stages.

requireAllStagesDependencyReady.description: When set, requires every planned pipeline stage to have all declared required inputs satisfied before it runs.

requireAllStagesRuntimeRequiredReadsHave.description: When set, requires every reported stage to run with data for all declared required input artifacts.

requireAllStagesRuntimeOptionalReadsHave.description: When set, requires every reported stage to run with data for all declared optional input artifacts.

maxTotalEmptyRequiredRuntimeReads.description: Maximum allowed total empty required runtime input reads summed across all reported stages.

maxTotalEmptyOptionalRuntimeReads.description: Maximum allowed total empty optional runtime input reads summed across all reported stages.

requireAllStagesWriteOnlyDeclaredArtifac.description: When set, requires every reported stage to change only artifacts declared in that stage's pipeline metadata writes list.

maxTotalUndeclaredChangedArtifacts.description: Maximum allowed total undeclared changed artifacts summed across all reported stages.

maxTotalEmptyDeclaredOutputs.description: Maximum allowed total declared stage outputs that remained empty after their stages ran.

minQualityGrade.description: Minimum deterministic scan quality grade required for this fixture. Grade ordering is Unknown, Poor, ReviewRequired, Usable, Strong.

minQualityConfidence.description: Minimum overall deterministic scan quality confidence, from 0 to 1.

maxQualityIssues.description: Maximum number of deterministic scan quality issues allowed.

maxScanRiskIssues.description: Maximum number of professional scan-risk quality issues allowed. Scan-risk issue codes start with quality.scan_risk.

maxScanReviewQueueItems.description: Maximum number of scanner-generated review queue items allowed for this fixture.

maxScanReviewQueueKindCounts.description: Maximum allowed scanner review queue item count per kind, keyed by exported review kind such as OpeningReview or WallGraphGapReview.

requiredScanReviewQueueKinds.description: Scanner review queue kinds that must be present.

forbiddenScanReviewQueueKinds.description: Scanner review queue kinds that must be absent.

minImportReadinessGrade.description: Minimum downstream import readiness grade required for this fixture. Grade ordering is Unknown, Blocked, ReviewRequired, Usable, Strong.

minImportReadinessScore.description: Minimum downstream import readiness score, from 0 to 1.

requireGeometryImportReady.description: When true, the scan must be safe enough for downstream geometry-coordinate import.

requireMetricImportReady.description: When true, the scan must be safe enough for downstream metric-coordinate import.

requireRoutingImportReady.description: When true, the scan must be safe enough for downstream routing-layer import.

allowImportReview.description: When false, the fixture fails if import readiness still requires manual review.

requiredSourceFormat.description: Expected normalized document source format such as pdf, dxf, raster, or extracted-primitives.

requiredSourceLoader.description: Expected registered loader name, for example PDF/PdfPig or DXF/IxMilia.

requiredSourceKind.description: Expected original source kind recorded in document metadata, such as Pdf, Dxf, Dwg, RasterImage, Clipboard, or ExtractedPrimitives.

requiredEffectiveSourceKind.description: Expected effective content kind after wrappers such as clipboard routing.

requiredSourceIngestionPath.description: Expected ingestion route, such as pdf-vector, dxf-vector, dwg-to-dxf, raster-extraction, or extracted-primitives.

requiredSourceReadinessStatus.description: Expected source-readiness status, such as VectorGeometryReady, PdfRasterOcrRecommended, DwgAdapterBacked, RasterExtractorBacked, RasterExtractorRequired, NormalizedPrimitives, or Unknown.

requiredSourceGeometryBasis.description: Expected source-readiness geometry basis, such as pdf-vector-geometry or converted-dxf-vector-geometry.

requireSourceVectorGeometryReady.description: When true, benchmarked source metadata must say vector geometry is usable for deterministic scanning.

requireSourceExternalAdapter.description: Expected source-readiness adapter requirement. DWG and unbacked raster workflows should normally require an external adapter.

requireSourceOcr.description: Expected OCR requirement for this fixture.

requireSourceLegalAdapterBacked.description: When true, source metadata must indicate the ingestion path is backed by a legal registered adapter/converter rather than a fake parser claim.

requiredSourceEvidenceContains.description: Substrings that must appear in source-readiness evidence, such as format=pdf, loader=PDF/PdfPig, or dwg.converter=...

forbiddenSourceEvidenceContains.description: Substrings that must not appear in source-readiness evidence.

minMeasurementCheckedCount.description: Minimum number of matched dimensions that must be checked against selected calibration.

minMeasurementConsistentCount.description: Minimum number of matched dimensions that must agree with selected calibration.

maxMeasurementOutlierCount.description: Maximum number of matched dimensions allowed to disagree with selected calibration.

maxMeasurementOutlierRatio.description: Maximum fraction of checked dimensions allowed to be outliers, from 0 to 1.

maxMeasurementScaleSpreadRatio.description: Maximum allowed ratio between the largest and smallest implied matched-dimension drawing scales.

requiredQualityIssueCodes.description: Quality issue codes that must be present in the deterministic quality report.

forbiddenQualityIssueCodes.description: Quality issue codes that must be absent from the deterministic quality report. Useful for forbidding scan-risk failures such as sheet contamination.

requiredImportIssueCodes.description: Import readiness issue codes that must be present in the computed import readiness summary.

forbiddenImportIssueCodes.description: Import readiness issue codes that must be absent from the computed import readiness summary.

artifactExpectations.description: Final scan artifact inventory gates. Use these to catch downstream-facing regressions such as missing walls, empty wall graphs, lost room topology, or routing artifact explosions.

annotationReferenceMetrics.description: Target matching for plan-side annotation references. Targets can use marker, text, bounds, pageNumber, and parent annotationKind.

objectAggregateMetrics.description: Target matching for compound object aggregates. Targets can use bounds, object category/kind, child-count minimum, review flag, routing influence, structural influence, room-use evidence, and child suppression criteria.

routingBarrierMetrics.description: Target matching for downstream routing barriers derived from structural wall evidence.

routingPassageMetrics.description: Target matching for downstream routing passages derived from openings, doors, and windows.

routingObstacleMetrics.description: Target matching for downstream routing obstacles derived from object candidates or aggregates.

routingRoomUseHintMetrics.description: Target matching for semantic routing hints such as parking, mechanical, electrical, or industrial room-use evidence.

routingSuppressedObjectMetrics.description: Target matching for child object detections intentionally suppressed from downstream routing. Targets can assert child candidate ID, aggregate ID, suppression reason/action, replacement obstacle, room-use hint, bounds, and aggregate influence.

sourcePath.description: Path to the fixture source file. Relative paths resolve from the manifest directory; environment variables such as %USERPROFILE% are expanded by the CLI.

optional.description: When true, a missing sourcePath is reported as a skipped case instead of a failed benchmark. Present optional files are scanned normally.

skipReason.description: Optional human-readable reason shown when an optional fixture is skipped because its source file is unavailable.

completeTruthSet.description: When true, unmatched scored detections are treated as false positives for readiness and comparison. Leave false/omitted for spot-check recall targets whose target list is not exhaustive.

requireDependencyReady.description: When set, requires this pipeline stage to have all declared required inputs satisfied by the execution plan.

maxMissingRequiredReads.description: Maximum allowed number of missing required input artifacts for this stage in the execution plan.

maxMissingOptionalReads.description: Maximum allowed number of missing optional input artifacts for this stage in the execution plan.

requireRuntimeRequiredReadsHaveData.description: When set, requires every declared required runtime input artifact to be present with data when the stage ran.

requireRuntimeOptionalReadsHaveData.description: When set, requires every declared optional runtime input artifact to be present with data when the stage ran.

maxEmptyRequiredRuntimeReads.description: Maximum allowed number of required runtime input artifacts that were missing or empty when the stage ran.

maxEmptyOptionalRuntimeReads.description: Maximum allowed number of optional runtime input artifacts that were missing or empty when the stage ran.

requireWritesOnlyDeclaredArtifacts.description: When set, requires this stage to change only artifacts declared in its pipeline metadata writes list.

maxUndeclaredChangedArtifacts.description: Maximum allowed number of changed artifacts that were not declared as stage outputs.

maxEmptyDeclaredOutputs.description: Maximum allowed number of declared stage outputs that remained empty after the stage ran.

artifactExpectations.description: Per-stage artifact count gates. Use these to catch regressions such as wall graph explosions, missing topology outputs, or object-candidate noise before visual review.

artifact.description: Final PlanArtifactKind reported by diagnostics.artifactInventory, for example Walls, WallGraph, Rooms, Openings, RoutingBarriers, RoutingPassages, ObjectAggregates, or Diagnostics.

requirePresent.description: When set, requires the final artifact inventory count to be greater than zero, or zero when false.

artifact.description: Plan artifact kind reported by the pipeline ledger, for example WallGraph, TopologySpans, Openings, ObjectCandidates, SurfacePatterns, RoutingBarriers, RoutingPassages, RoutingObstacles, or RoutingSuppressedObjects.

minDelta.description: Minimum allowed artifact delta for the stage. Deltas may be negative when a stage removes or suppresses artifacts.

maxDelta.description: Maximum allowed artifact delta for the stage. Deltas may be negative when a stage removes or suppresses artifacts.

requireChanged.description: When set, requires the artifact to have a non-zero changedArtifacts entry for this stage, or requires no change when false.
